company_description:
-Background-
In an ever-changing landscape of technological advancement and rising costs, it is indeed a paradoxical race against time to stay competitive amidst the heightened compliance settings imposed by our regulatory authorities – Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) and Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA).

The implementation of Ethics Pronouncement (EP) 200 to combat Money Laundering (AML) and the Financing of Terrorism activities (CFT) poses new challenges for business owners.

Banks no longer conduct detailed background checks alone but this responsibility is passed on to the Registered Filing Agent (RFA) who has to ensure that a start-up declares any Beneficial Owner(s) who is/are not listed as Shareholder/Director of a specific company. In addition, there is also a need to declare if the Beneficial Owners(s) is/are related to any Politically Exposed Person (PEP).

Small businesses that have an annual turnover of SGD 10 million must undergo compulsory audit, in contrast to SGD 5 million previously set by the government. This measure allows the government to concentrate their resources on larger entities, which are more prone to the effects of AML/CFT and lack of corporate governance.

-The dilemma-
We understand that business owners are concerned about profit and expansion of their businesses. However, we also recognize that it is vital to comply with the heightened statutory requirements concerning the annual filing declaration of your financial statements and income.

-How will PLCO assist me in my business?-
We will assist you in all aspects of regulatory compliance for your Singapore setup company. This allows you to concentrate on other aspects of your business, with a peace of mind!

-Why choose us?-
We are professionals in the field, possessing in-depth technical knowledge of the SFRS. We will be responsible for your financial preparation that comes with a competitive pricing thus giving you an edge over others in compliance cost.

company_description:
Established in 1984, Thong & Lim is a partnership of highly trained and experienced chartered accountants and professionals. The firm provides a full range of professional and consultancy services and advice to corporate and individual clients.

AUDIT & ASSURANCE
The majority of our clients conduct their businesses through incorporated companies that are subject to company legislation. Statutory auditing therefore forms a large part of the Firm's professional work, the scope of which is determined both by legislation and the financial reporting and auditing standards.

With a sound practical knowledge of auditing, we are able to tailor our audit approach to meet the specific circumstances of each client. At the conclusion of every audit, so that clients fully benefit from our findings, we make appropriate recommendations for improvements to accounting systems and controls and other operational areas.


TAXATION SERVICES
Tax legislation and the implications for businesses are becoming increasingly complex. Through our tax division, we provide tax advice and other related services and are particularly well placed to act for clients for whom we are also auditors.


CORPORATE SECRETARIAL SERVICES & BOOK KEEPING
Companies often cannot commercially justify having in-house resources committed to meeting a complex range of statutory and accounting requirements. 

Thong & Lim can set up and maintain books of accounts, provide payroll and vendor payment services and file statutory returns.

For companies that qualify for exemption from statutory audits, Thong & Lim can assists in drafting financial statements complying with Financial Reporting Standards as required by the Companies Act.

company_description:
Established in 1984, Thong & Lim is a partnership of highly trained and experienced chartered accountants and professionals. The firm provides a full range of professional and consultancy services and advice to corporate and individual clients.

AUDIT & ASSURANCE
The majority of our clients conduct their businesses through incorporated companies that are subject to company legislation. Statutory auditing therefore forms a large part of the Firm's professional work, the scope of which is determined both by legislation and the financial reporting and auditing standards.

With a sound practical knowledge of auditing, we are able to tailor our audit approach to meet the specific circumstances of each client. At the conclusion of every audit, so that clients fully benefit from our findings, we make appropriate recommendations for improvements to accounting systems and controls and other operational areas.


TAXATION SERVICES
Tax legislation and the implications for businesses are becoming increasingly complex. Through our tax division, we provide tax advice and other related services and are particularly well placed to act for clients for whom we are also auditors.


CORPORATE SECRETARIAL SERVICES & BOOK KEEPING
Companies often cannot commercially justify having in-house resources committed to meeting a complex range of statutory and accounting requirements. 

Thong & Lim can set up and maintain books of accounts, provide payroll and vendor payment services and file statutory returns.

For companies that qualify for exemption from statutory audits, Thong & Lim can assists in drafting financial statements complying with Financial Reporting Standards as required by the Companies Act.

company_description:
Pinnacle Tax Services Pte. Ltd. is a boutique tax consultancy firm set up in 2014. 

We are one of very few professional services firms in Singapore that specializes in providing tax services. Founded by two senior tax professionals who were formerly from the "Big 4" accounting firms, who between them have above 30 years of tax experience, we seek to provide high quality tax services to our clients at reasonable rates.
Prior to setting up the firm, the founders found that there was a gap in the tax services industry in Singapore. Quality tax service providers are mainly limited to the larger accounting and law firms. Smaller accounting practices may have a tax practice, but their tax teams are mainly staffed by accountants who have limited tax knowledge and experience. The higher level of fees charged by the larger firms are sometimes prohibitive for smaller companies or firms which may have a limited budget for tax services. Pinnacle Tax Services Pte. Ltd. was therefore set up to address this gap in the professional tax services market.

Our clientele includes both international businesses, Singaporean listed companies and SMEs. With the extensive experience gained from the "Big 4" accounting firms, we seek to provide the quality tax services normally associated with the "Big 4" accounting firms. At the same time, we seek to provide more value to our clients by providing practical solutions to them (through our understanding of their business and business environment) and providing them with more personalized services.

It organises exciting events such as ASoc Freshmen Camp for the incoming BAcc freshmen, providing them a platform to integrate into SMU's culture. company_description:
ASoc strives to establish an integrative culture for BAcc students and promote an environment for holistic development. It organises exciting events such as ASoc Freshmen Camp for the incoming BAcc freshmen, providing them a platform to integrate into SMU's culture. One of their biggest night events, ASoc Night, serves to foster stronger bonds amongst Accountancy students. With a fun-filled night of food, drinks and entertainment, ASoc's birthday is celebrated and the ASoc pageantees also impress the crowd with their performances. 

Another aspect of ASoc's mission is to ensure the holistic development of BAcc students. With events such as ASoc Axplore and Alumnight, these give students opportunities to link up with professional bodies, private sector companies and BAcc alumni working in various sectors. In addition, ASoc occasionally organises corporate visits to allow BAcc students to understand the companies' cultures and opportunities they offer for them. To guide students through their course of study, ASoc publishes yearly guidebooks such as Freshman Guidebook for incoming freshmen and Module Difficulty Guidebook catered to BAcc students across all years of study. 

ASoc is also highly involved in community service programmes, organising Project Moolah for the 13th year. Project Moolah aims to inculcate the importance of financial literacy to secondary school students. Another project that ASoc prides itself in is the SMU-MCCY Transparency Assessment. In this project, BAcc students serve as student assessors for hundreds of charities, promoting the importance of good corporate governance practices and fair disclosures.
